title: Make requirements lock the single source of truth

riskAssessment.reason: Removing the redundant direct-pin file prevents competing dependency truths.

executionDecision.reason: CI already installs the lock; remove the unused duplicate artifact.

preReviewWarnings: Verify no workflow or documentation consumes requirements-dev.txt.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The Work Item Contract is updated for the actual task.
The new feature is implemented according to requirements.
Unit tests are added to verify the new feature.
User documentation or comments are updated.
guidelines: Dependency installation paths must reference requirements-dev.lock.
Do not retain redundant generated dependency artifacts.

intent.problem: requirements-dev.txt duplicates direct pins while CI installs requirements-dev.lock.
constraints: Keep requirements-dev.in as direct input and requirements-dev.lock as reproducible install artifact.
intent.rationale: Delete the unused duplicate file and add regression coverage for the single source-of-truth pair.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized full automated execution of review remediation work items.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
